entries.message: Fractal Documentation System - AI-optimized hierarchical documentation
entries.searchable_text: fractal documentation system - ai-optimized hierarchical documentation   operational documentation fractal iss ai-optimized

entries.message: Use fractal 3-layer structure for all documentation
entries.searchable_text: use fractal 3-layer structure for all documentation token efficiency: strategic (800 tokens) → tactical (3,200 tokens) → implementation (18,000 tokens). ai can progressively load only what's needed. 97% token savings vs loading full tree.  architecture fractal token-efficiency

entries.message: Strategic Layer - High-level architecture and decisions
entries.searchable_text: strategic layer - high-level architecture and decisions  the strategic layer contains high-level information: branch purpose, major decisions, architectural choices, and macro-level patterns. typically 800-1,500 tokens. this is what ai reads first to understand if a tree is relevant. strategic layer-system architecture

entries.message: Tactical Layer - Implementation approaches and modules
entries.searchable_text: tactical layer - implementation approaches and modules  the tactical layer contains mid-level details: implementation strategies, module organization, component patterns, and technical approaches. typically 2,000-5,000 tokens. ai loads this when strategic layer shows relevance. tactical layer-system implementation

entries.message: Implementation Layer - Specific code and details
entries.searchable_text: implementation layer - specific code and details  the implementation layer contains fine-grained details: specific files, code snippets, utilities, edge cases, and micro-optimizations. typically 10,000-25,000 tokens. ai loads this only when coding or debugging specific features. implementation layer-system details

iss integration - automatic summary generation  iss (index scrolling system) integration enables automatic discovery. the hierarchical-summarizer generates 3-layer markdown summaries with yaml frontmatter. the indexer updates iss for fast lookups. the intelligent-loader auto-discovers relevant trees based on queries. iss automation discovery

token efficiency - why this matters  full tree loading: ~25,000 tokens. strategic only: ~800 tokens (97% savings). strategic + tactical: ~4,000 tokens (84% savings). this enables ai to scan 30+ trees in the same token budget as loading 1 full tree. critical for large codebases and multi-project contexts. efficiency tokens ai-optimization

usage examples - real-world applications  use cases: (1) planning new features - load strategic layers of related projects. (2) code review - load tactical + implementation of specific modules. (3) architecture decisions - compare strategic layers across multiple projects. (4) onboarding - progressive loading from macro to micro. (5) cross-project analysis - scan strategic layers of entire codebase. examples use-cases workflows
